creator: mph@pobox.com
text:
This patch updates print/c2ps to version 4.0.

It also simplifies the selection of A4 or Letter paper (though changes
are welcome) and uses the INSTALL_* macros instead of hardcoding
"install".

Fix: 

Apply the following patch.  Also, place the distfile on ftp.freebsd.org,
because fetch(1) cannot retrieve it (nor the old distfile); see PR
bin/5047.  Thanks!
